title: Toast Show Off
description: A peppery and dense Algerian dish featuring shiitake mushrooms on toasted bread, perfect for a raw-friendly breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Shiitake Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Use wild or button mushrooms if shiitakes are not available.

instructions: Toast the bread slices until golden brown, about 3-5 minutes per side.
Heat a few drops of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add shiitake mushrooms and red pepper flakes to the pan. Season with salt.
Cook until the mushrooms release their moisture, then reduce the heat and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes.
Gently fold the cooked shiitakes onto the toasted bread slices.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
